chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. D 5369 of 2023 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 16-01-2025. Mr. Abdul Wahab Abro, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Kamran, AAG Mr. Assad Jehangir Shah, files his vakalatnama on behalf of the respondent, which is taken on record. Petitioner seeks orders of this Court to appoint him as a police constable. The comments of the official respondents, available on record, assert that the petitioner was not qualified and even the corroboratory documents submitted there before were found to be forged; during verification. While no rejoinder on behalf of the petitioner in respect of the aforesaid has been demonstrated before this Court, however, even if the respondents’ assertion was disputed, such question was not amenable for resolution in the writ jurisdiction of this Court. It is apparent that no vested right has been demonstrated before us to merit invocation of the discretionary1 writ jurisdiction of this Court and even otherwise this matter is fraught with factual controversy, not amenable for adjudication in writ jurisdiction2. In view hereof, this petition is found to be misconceived and is hereby dismissed. Judge Judge Nadeem 1 Per Ijaz Ul Ahsan J. in Syed Iqbal Hussain Shah Gillani vs. PBC & Others reported as 2021 SCMR 425; Muhammad Fiaz Khan vs. Ajmer Khan & Another reported as 2010 SCMR 105. 2 2016 CLC 1; 2015 PLC 45; 2015 CLD 257; 2011 SCMR 1990; 2001 SCMR 574; PLD 2001 Supreme Court 415.
